pageName: TiDB for Agentic AI: Scale Stateful Agent Workloads

meta.title: TiDB for Agentic AI: Scale Stateful Agent Workloads
meta.description: TiDB supports branching, durable state, and concurrency for agent systems. Build scalable agentic AI applications with instant isolation and transactional consistency.

props.headline: The Database Built for Agentic Workloads
props.subheadline: Agent systems create bursts of isolated work, memory, and state that traditional databases were not designed to handle. TiDB supports branching, durable state, and concurrency for agents operating independently at scale.

props.title: Purpose-Built for Agentic Scale
props.subtitle: Designed to keep branching, state, and transactional consistency together as agents operate across multiple tasks and sessions.

items.title: Instant Branching
items.description: Create isolated database environments in milliseconds for parallel tasks, agent sessions, and experimentation.

items.title: Durable Agent State
items.description: Persist memory, intermediate outputs, and workflow progress across long-running agent interactions.

items.title: Concurrent Execution at Scale
items.description: Support growing agent activity across sessions and branches while maintaining transactional consistency.

props.title: Proven at Scale
props.subtitle: Leading AI teams use TiDB to power stateful agent systems.

items.title: Manus
items.description: Scaled autonomous agent orchestration with instant branching for parallel task execution.

items.title: Dify
items.description: Built end-to-end agent workflows with persistent state management across complex multi-step operations.

items.title: Rengage
items.description: Deployed concurrent agent sessions with ACID guarantees for reliable state tracking.

props.title: Build, Test, and Scale Agent Systems
props.subtitle: Explore practical examples, runnable demos, and developer resources for building stateful agent workflows on TiDB.

tabs.label: Database Branching
tabs.description: Instant isolated environments for parallel agent execution
bullets: Create branches in milliseconds without data duplication
Merge changes back safely with conflict resolution
Full ACID transactions within each branch

tabs.label: Persistent State
tabs.description: Store intermediate outputs and long-running memory reliably
bullets: Durably persist agent memory across sessions
Track tool outputs and decision logs
Support long-running workflows without data loss
Query historical state for analysis and debugging

tabs.label: Concurrent Transactions
bullets: Multiple agents write safely to shared systems
Lock-free reads scale with agent workload

props.title: Common Agentic Patterns
props.subtitle: Practical code examples and architectural patterns for agent systems on TiDB.

items.title: Branch-per-Agent Pattern
items.description: Map independent agent tasks to isolated branches for parallel execution without interference.

items.title: Stateful Workflow Tracking
items.description: Persist tool outputs and decisions across steps with queryable workflow history.

items.title: Multi-Agent Coordination
items.description: Patterns for multiple agents writing safely to shared systems with strong consistency.

items.title: Context-Aware, Usage-Based Scaling
items.description: Autoscaling based on real-time workload signals and RU/s limits—no more overprovisioning or manual tuning.
